SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE ANDRES SANCHEZ, AN ATTORNEY AT M.C. HALL & ASSOCIATES, PC, AND DEFENDANT ELIZABETH MA. DAVID MA WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MS. MA. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF M.C. HALL & ASSOCIATES, P.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MA, ELIZABETH $382.50 PRINCIPAL, $22.31 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $454.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
